title: SKiDL 2.2.2 Release
date: 2026-04-03
author: Dave Vandenbout
slug: skidl-two-dot-two-dot-two-release

Today marks the release of SKiDL version **2.2.2**.
This release adds the ability to generate schematics for recent versions of KiCad (6, 7, 8 and 9).
Thanks to Github users [lachlanfysh](https://github.com/lachlanfysh) and [cyberhuman](https://github.com/cyberhuman)
for their work on this.

See [SKiDL's complete history](https://github.com/devbisme/skidl/blob/master/HISTORY.md) for all the changes
made in each release.
